title: Spicy Chicken Fajitas
description: A flavorful and spicy chicken dish made with fajita-style stir-fry, served with a Mexican twist.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onions and bell peppers to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-5 minutes.
Add the stir-fry sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce and vegetables.
Season with fajita seasoning, salt, and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
Serve with warm flour or corn tortillas, if desired.
